title: PL X 2
excerpt: Lately when I have been working on Project Life spreads, it seems that I have to really try hard to make sure the entire spread isn't of Jack. I suppose it's a good little challenge though, considering most of the…
body: Lately when I have been working on Project Life spreads, it seems that I have to really try hard to make sure the entire spread isn't of Jack. I suppose it's a good little challenge though, considering most of the photos I am taking lately include the cutie. Here are a couple of recent Project Life spreads using mostly Plus One products.
